description: The payload team has requested that our sounding rocket spin slowly during its coast phase to ensure uniform data sampling for the onboard magnetometer. Modify the fins of the currently loaded simple model rocket to have a 3.0-degree cant angle. Save the modified design to '~/Documents/rockets/spin_stabilized_rocket.ork' and create a spin stabilization report at '~/Documents/exports/spin_stabilization_report.txt' documenting the cant angle, the simulated apogee altitude, an explanation of how canted fins induce spin, and any observed performance impacts compared to a zero-cant configuration.
